items.name: Proud Heel Stretch
items.description:
Smile while you look like 
a professional Cheerleader!
- It's usually done by the flyers.

Works well with Pom-Pom's.
(Layered Clothing)

This Emote Includes Facial Animations
& was made for the:
[3.0] Woman Bundle - https://www.roblox.com/bundles/239/Woman
 - and -
BenereV2 Faces - https://www.roblox.com/users/1160312701/profile
Please make sure to use that, 
unless you have another bundle that works!

I tried my best to keep the anatomy as 
accurate and realistic as possible!

Matches This Emote: (https://www.roblox.com/catalog/119818392298899/Bow-and-Arrow)

Please use appropriately,
as this is a roleplay & proper use emote!
Inappropriate use might result in 
your account being at risk.
Thanks, for understanding.

Favorite this and join the group 
for more Idle emotes like this! - It really helps

PS: sorry again to the 60 people 
that bought the original version...
Id give y'all a special role in the group
if that makes up for it- </3

Made by @SpIitsie
